PROJ_DISPLAY_NAME: Project to Support Food Production and Build Resilience in Alibori, Borgou, and Collines Departments (PAPVIRE-ABC)
PROJ_DEV_OBJECTIVE_DESC: The Project to Support Food Production and Build Resilience (PAPVIRE-ABC) aims to improve food and nutrition security, increase the incomes of vulnerable small-scale farmers, and mitigate poverty among rural households in Alibori, Borgou, and Collines Departments of Benin. The project will target municipalities with significant agricultural potential but facing economic, social, and environmental disadvantages. It will directly benefit over 50,000 people, with over half being women, and indirectly benefit 400,000 individuals in the project area. The project will achieve these objectives through investments in rural infrastructure, agricultural value chain development, and resilience building.

The project will achieve these objectives through investments in rural infrastructure, agricultural value chain development, and resilience building.

PROJ_DISPLAY_NAME: Kenya Small Scale Irrigation and Value Addition Project (SIVAP)
PROJ_DEV_OBJECTIVE_DESC: The Kenya Small Scale Irrigation and Value Addition Project (SIVAP) aims to contribute to poverty reduction by enhancing agricultural productivity and income, and improving food security among beneficiaries in eleven counties. The project focuses on areas receiving low to moderate rainfall and will support the development of small-scale irrigation schemes. It will achieve this through investments in irrigation infrastructure, improved market access, value chain strengthening, and institutional capacity building. The project will be implemented over six years, targeting farmers and communities in the selected counties.

PROJ_DISPLAY_NAME: Food and Nutrition Security Enhancement Project (PReSAN-KL)
PROJ_DEV_OBJECTIVE_DESC: The Koulikoro Region Food and Nutrition Security Enhancement Project (PReSAN-KL) is a five-year project designed to enhance food and nutrition security in the Koulikoro region of Mali. The project will focus on improving agricultural productivity and incomes for smallholder farmers, particularly women and youth. It aims to strengthen local capacity for sustainable agricultural practices and improve access to markets. Ultimately, the project seeks to reduce vulnerability to food insecurity and malnutrition within the targeted communities.
PROJ_OBJECTIVE_TEXT: The Koulikoro Region Food and Nutrition Security Enhancement Project (PReSAN-KL) is a five-year project designed to enhance food and nutrition security in the Koulikoro region of Mali. The project will focus on improving agricultural productivity and incomes for smallholder farmers, particularly women and youth. It aims to strengthen local capacity for sustainable agricultural practices and improve access to markets. Ultimately, the project seeks to reduce vulnerability to food insecurity and malnutrition within the targeted communities.

PROJ_DEV_OBJECTIVE_DESC: The Smallholder Commercialisation Programme (SCP) aims to intensify, diversify, and commercialize smallholder agriculture in Sierra Leone, aligning with the country's National Sustainable Agriculture Development Plan (NSADP). The program focuses on improving food security and generating wealth for the most vulnerable populations. It supports the operationalization of the NSADP on a national scale, prioritizing smallholder farmers and farmer-based organizations (FBOs). The project is supported by the Global Agriculture and Food Security Programme (SCP-GAFSP) with USD 50 million in funding.
PROJ_OBJECTIVE_TEXT: The Smallholder Commercialisation Programme (SCP) aims to intensify, diversify, and commercialize smallholder agriculture in Sierra Leone, aligning with the country's National Sustainable Agriculture Development Plan (NSADP). The program focuses on improving food security and generating wealth for the most vulnerable populations. It supports the operationalization of the NSADP on a national scale, prioritizing smallholder farmers and farmer-based organizations (FBOs). The project is supported by the Global Agriculture and Food Security Programme (SCP-GAFSP) with USD 50 million in funding.
Indicators: Agricultural sector growth from 4 percent to 7.7 percent per annum by 2015 | Increased incomes of farming households by 10 percent | Increased household food security by 25 percent | Setting up 2,750 FBOs | Building 650 Agricultural Business Centres (ABC) | Developing small scale irrigation on 18,000ha of land | Creation of 130 new Financial Services Associations (FSA) | Rehabilitating and maintaining 4,000km of rural roads
Components: Component 1: Smallholder agriculture commercialization: production intensification, diversification, value addition and marketing | Component 2: Small scale irrigation development | Component 6: SCP Planning, Coordination, Monitoring and Evaluation | Component 1: Smallholder Agriculture Commercialisation | Component 2: Small Scale Irrigation Development | Component 3: Access to Financial Services | Smallholder agriculture commercialization: production intensification, diversification, value addition and marketing | Small scale irrigation development | SCP Planning, Coordination, Monitoring and Evaluation | Improving smallholder production and commercialisation by setting up 2,750 FBOs and building 650 Agricultural Business Centres (ABC) | Developing small scale irrigation to boost rice production on 18,000ha of land | Providing better access to financial services through the creation of 130 new Financial Services Associations (FSA) | Improving access to markets by rehabilitating and maintaining 4,000km of rural roads
